How to reduce body weight? 54 POINTS TO PONDER /c243Slow and steady reduction in body weight is advisable. /c243Severe fasting may lead to health hazards. /c243Achieve energy balance and appropriate weight for height. /c243Encourage regular physical activity. /c243Eat small meals regularly at frequent intervals. /c243Cut down sugar, salt, fatty foods, refined foods, soft drinks and alcohol. /c243Eat complex carbohydrates, low glycemic foods and fibre rich diets. /c243Increase consumption of fruits and vegetables, legumes, whole grains and nuts. /c243Limit fat intake and shift from saturated to unsaturated fats. /c243Avoid trans-fatty rich foods ( vanaspati , bakery products and sweets). /c243Use low- fat
